description: Apple Silicon cluster monitoring + ANE inference orchestration

features.title: IOReport ANE power monitoring
features.description: Sudoless ANE power via Energy Model IOReport channel. GET /ane endpoint returning watts, power-gated status.

features.title: ANE compute bridge (ObjC FFI)
features.description: Rust FFI to _ANEInMemoryModel via ObjC bridge. Feature-gated (--features ane). POST /ane/eval endpoint.

features.title: MoE expert routing on ANE
features.description: Extend Bokhan graph API for MoE: router on CPU, expert dispatch to ANE. Target: Qwen 3.5-35B-A3B (3B active).

features.title: DirectPathClient — target individual ANE dies
features.description: Probe H1xANELoadBalancerDirectPathClient to bypass load balancer and target ane0/ane1 on M3 Ultra. Pipeline parallelism within single node.

features.title: Add /topology HTTP endpoints to daemon
features.description: GET /topology (JSON), GET /topology/dot, GET /topology/validate. 60s cache, follow thunderbolt_cache pattern. Phase 3 from topology handoff.

features.title: Update /jaccl/config to use live topology
features.description: Replace stale rdma_links in jaccl_config_handler with topology discovery. Proper error on incomplete mesh.

features.title: Speculative decoding: ANE draft + GPU verify
features.description: Mirror Speculative Decoding pattern. ANE runs 4-bit draft model, GPU verifies. Unified memory KV cache handoff.

features.title: Cross-node ANE pipeline via RDMA
features.description: Node A runs layers 0-N on ANE, ships activations via TB5 RDMA to Node B for layers N-2N. Requires JACCL integration.

features.title: Port maderix training loop to Rust/asmi
features.description: Adapt the 6-kernel training loop (fwdAttn, fwdFFN, ffnBwd, sdpaBwd1, sdpaBwd2, qkvBwd) from ObjC to Rust via Bokhan's MIL API. Include exec() restart for compile budget.

features.title: Commit uncommitted topology.rs and main.rs
features.description: src/topology.rs and src/main.rs have uncommitted changes from the topology session.
